summary: Terms page successfully implements the required legal document structure with proper diner aesthetic palette, typography, and layout. All critical screen spec requirements are met including the back link, Terms of Service heading, effective date, section structure, and support contact.

violations.description: Support contact link uses rose #b83f5f color as specified, but could benefit from slightly better contrast against the cream background for optimal accessibility
Legal longform article uses appropriate shadow-sm treatment as documented exception to the branded diner hard shadows

actions: Verify support email link functionality in browser tests
Consider minor contrast enhancement for support links while maintaining brand compliance
Validate all section headings match the legal route heading contract requirements
